summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PaisaPe V3 P0/P1 features - 12/12 backend tests passed (11 run, 1 skipped), all frontend UI features verified. Key P0/P1 features validated: operatorName field in all transaction listings, Check Status functionality for pending sandbox transactions, Ledger Report with opening/closing balances.

issues: Operator column shows full UUID (operatorId) instead of operator name for older transactions without operatorName field. New transactions show correct operator names like 'Jio'.

critical_code_review_comments: P0 operatorName field is correctly added to recharge schema and populated during transaction creation
P1 Check Status functionality works correctly - sandbox transactions randomly resolve to success/failed/pending
Backend correctly handles debit-first flow with commission on success and refund on failure
seed_data_creation: Created 5+ sandbox test transactions via /api/recharge/sandbox-test to verify operatorName field
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0/P1 features tested and working. New test credentials: admin@test.com/password123 and retailer@test.com/password123. Backend is NestJS with dynamic variable substitution for API calls ([number], [op_code], [txn_id], [amount] placeholders). Sandbox mode randomly assigns success/pending/failed status. Check Status resolves sandbox pending txns randomly (60% success, 20% still pending, 20% failed).

tested_features.live_transactions_operator_column: PASSED - Shows 'Operator' column header with values like 'Jio'
tested_features.transaction_detail_dialog_operator: PASSED - Dialog shows Operator field with name 'Jio'
tested_features.advanced_reports_all_tab_operator: PASSED - All Transactions tab has Operator column
tested_features.advanced_reports_failed_tab_operator: PASSED - Failed Transactions tab has Operator column
tested_features.advanced_reports_pending_tab_operator: PASSED - Pending Transactions tab has Operator column
tested_features.sandbox_bulk_test_with_operator: PASSED - POST /api/recharge/sandbox-test creates txns with operatorName
tested_features.check_status_pending_txns: PASSED - POST /api/recharge/:id/check-status resolves sandbox pending txns
tested_features.ledger_report_page: PASSED - Shows consolidated ledger with Opening Bal, Amount (Net), Closing Bal
tested_features.retailer_dashboard: PASSED - Shows wallet balance ₹8408.00, recent transactions

mocked_apis.note: Sandbox mode uses mock random responses for recharge provider API calls

Check Status - sandbox resolves randomly (60% success, 20% pending, 20% failed)
